/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/veresy_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/app/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/data/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veresy.dir/core/orders/OrderManager.cpp.o -o veresy  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
